videos.headline: Long Island University Sharks vs. Florida Gators: Full Highlights
videos.description: Long Island University Sharks vs. Florida Gators: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Long Island University Sharks vs. Florida Gators: Full Highlights) 2025/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: No. 15 Gators chomp Sharks in season opener
videos.description: DJ Lagway shines as he throws three TDs while Jadan Baugh rushes 104 yards to lead Florida to an electric 55-0 victory against Long Island.

videos.headline: Baugh, Jackson reflect on Florida's explosive plays vs. Long Island
videos.description: Jadan Baugh and Ja'Kobi Jackson recap the Gators' impressive performance from both sides of the field and discuss what makes DJ Lagway so cool under pressure.
